title: SexyBack
why_this_song: SexyBack by Justin Timberlake (2006) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Them other boys don't know how to act (yeah)
I think you're special, what's behind your back? (Yeah)
So turn around and I'll pick up the slack (yeah)
Drinks on me (go 'head, be gone with it)
Let me see what you're twerking with (go 'head, be gone with it)
Look at those hips (go 'head, be gone with it)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "head" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "head" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "gone" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "gone" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "SexyBack" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "SexyBack"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Justin Timberlake one question about "SexyBack", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Justin Timberlake sobre "SexyBack", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "SexyBack" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "SexyBack" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
